title: Annexes — Tower Duel
meta.desc: The annexes of the Tower Duel notebook: deployment (Docker & hosting), quick maths, and the annotated starting brief.
hero.title: Annexes
hero.lead: Extras to go further than the 4 chapters: host the game yourself, a detour through the maths, and the behind-the-scenes of the starting brief.
card.deploy.title: Deployment
card.deploy.desc: Build the Docker image and host the game online (alwaysdata, VPS, container platform, static).
card.math.title: Quick maths
card.math.desc: The square root, the legend of Quake III's 0x5f3759df, and how Pythagoras avoids the calculation.
card.brief.title: The starting brief
card.brief.desc: The spec that started it all — presented, annotated and critiqued: how to describe a project well.
